name: pi-zai-glm
description: Extra LLM providers for pi (Z.ai GLM).

description: Blocks destructive git operations (push, tag -d, reset --hard) in pi

description: Pi coding agent extension for LSP (Language Server Protocol) integration

description: Claude-style working message phrases and elapsed timer for Pi.

name: pi-extension-installer
description: Browse and install Pi community packages — interactive TUI browser with arrow-key navigation, search, previews, install, and uninstall support.

description: Config-driven preset and mode switching for pi — hard-enforced tool whitelists, mode aliases, and session persistence

name: @codingcoffee/pi-websearch-crawl4ai
description: a pi extension to let your LLM crawl & see the web

name: @jerryan/pi-subagent-lite

name: pi-session-switch
description: Preview each session before switching in a mirror of Pi's native `/resume`-picker UI

name: @casualjim/pi-taskplane-planner

name: pi-unified-exec
description: Codex-style unified_exec for pi: long-lived shell sessions the LLM polls and drives with write_stdin (Ctrl-C, arrow keys, PTY, REPLs, ssh, dev servers). Full output logged to disk.

name: pi-libsecret
description: Load API keys with secret-tool

name: pi-terminal-theme
description: Pi theme that maps UI colors to ANSI 0..15.

name: graphify-pi
description: Pi extension and skill package that makes graphify knowledge graphs always-on during coding sessions.

name: @p8n.ai/pi-remembers
description: Pi extension for persistent agent memory and project search powered by Cloudflare AI Search. The North Remembers.

name: pi-provider-cc-sdk

description: Sync pi theme with Ghostty terminal colors

description: Pi coding agent extension for analyzing token usage and cost across session files

name: pi-load-skill
description: Pi extension for loading skills on demand from any location

name: @codersbrew/pi-tools
description: A pi package bundling CodersBrew pi extensions and skills.

name: @m64/browser-tools
description: Minimal CDP tools for collaborative site exploration

name: pi-agent-browser
description: Browser automation tool for pi — interactive browsing, screenshots with inline vision, and session cleanup via agent-browser CLI

description: Provider-only Pi package that registers the single MiMo model used by pi-excalibur.

name: pk-pi-hermes-evolve
